design_validity_audit.interpretation: A pass means each frozen hidden target is publicly manipulable, covered by the Gate A recipes, observable before termination, instantiable, and absent from the mechanism-Agent prompt. It does not establish identifiability.

checks.detail: Every frozen recipe must contain a public measurement before termination.
The no-change twin must have no hidden intervention.
Each certification cell must change exactly one hidden law family.
The task must reset under the declared intervention.
A formal constitutive cell must declare its transform and all calibration parameters.

Constitutive contract must exactly match the task transform registry; expected_transform=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, declared_transform=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, declared_fields=['selectivity_decay_multiplier_at_full_severity', 'standard_potential_multiplier_at_full_severity', 'transfer_asymmetry_multiplier_at_full_severity', 'transform_id'].
A constitutive intervention must not rewrite the reaction network; unchanged=True, error=None.
Executed constitutive transform must equal the declared transform; declared=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, executed=electrochemical_response_stress_v1, error=None.

Exactly the declared constitutive parameters must change to their severity-interpolated values; expected_domain={'electro_transfer_asymmetry_multiplier': 1.3199999999999998, 'electro_selectivity_decay_multiplier': 2.6, 'electro_standard_potential_multiplier': 1.2}, executed_domain={'electro_transfer_asymmetry_multiplier': 1.3199999999999998, 'electro_standard_potential_multiplier': 1.2, 'electro_selectivity_decay_multiplier': 2.6}, expected_equilibrium_ratio=None, executed_equilibrium_ratio=None, error=None.

At least one public control implicated by the hidden law must vary across frozen recipes; varied=[{'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'potential_V'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'current_mA'}, {'operation': 'set_potential', 'field': 'electrolyte_profile'}].

A formal rate-law cell must declare its reaction role, transform, and calibration instead of selecting a reaction by declaration order.
Missing rate-law contract fields: []; unsupported_transform=False.
Exactly one rate law must change and it must equal the resolved semantic target; changed=['target_formation'], target=target_formation, error=None.
The executed mechanism must bind the declared reaction role; declared=primary_target_pathway, executed=primary_target_pathway, error=None.
The executed mechanism must bind the declared transform; declared=catalytic_activity_order_pivot_stress_v1, executed=catalytic_activity_order_pivot_stress_v1, error=None.
A reaction rate-law intervention must not also change crystallization or other constitutive domain parameters; unchanged=True, error=None.
Pivot-normalized rate-law cells require a preregistered response envelope.

A pivot-normalized response must make low/high public probes fall on opposite sides of unity; multipliers=[1.7584085293740113, 1.0020533891292474, 0.6392608311466849, 1.0020533891292474, 1.0020533891292474, 0.6392608311466849], error=None.

Executed topology must bind the declared transform; declared=reversible_target_pathway_stress_v1, executed=reversible_target_pathway_stress_v1, error=None.
Executed reverse-channel rate must equal severity times the declared full-severity value; expected=0.0005, executed=0.0005, error=None.
A topology intervention must not also change constitutive domain parameters; unchanged=True, error=None.

interpretation: The primary checkpoint establishes controlled identifiability from an online-history-aligned matched pre/post public recipe budget. Larger checkpoints are diagnostic curves with equally sized matched reference sets; they do not establish online-policy-feasible mechanism discovery. Full Gate A requires a separately bound online-policy-feasible certificate.

paired_phase_design.budget_interpretation: Budget 2 is the online-history-aligned stress point with two protocol-available pre-change references. Gate A controls at budget 4; the controlled certificate uses four matched references and four post-change diagnostics, while the online certificate retains the actual two-reference history and receives four post-change experiments.

public_feature_contract.active_action_source: prior expected information over frozen k-recipe batches at each checkpoint; the online policy pre-ranks four recipes before held-out execution and cycles through them without phase input
public_feature_contract.encoding: controlled certificate: matched post-minus-pre batches; online certificate: nuisance-integrated absolute trace on first observation, then a latent reference-time mixture of baseline-to-candidate transition contrasts and same-candidate stable contrasts; all use sorted flattened finite-masked public values
public_feature_contract.fixed_trajectory_action_source: first k actions in the frozen deterministic action library
public_feature_contract.source: agent-visible numeric observation and reward after every compiled public recipe operation in the controlled matched and actual hidden-change campaigns
